description: Deferred from bl-be5f. Spec bl-2e26 §12/§13/§11: 'Per-session worktree re-materialization for still-claimed tasks rides the same chain (the delivery plugin's prime.post, idempotent create-if-absent).' The shipped delivery plugin (bl-f813, src/delivery.rs dispatch matrix) handles claim/unclaim/drop/close but has NO prime handler. Add a prime.post arm that re-materializes work/<id> worktrees for tasks still claimed by this actor. Delivery-plugin territory, not core; core's prime chain (bl-be5f) already invokes prime/post.
title: Delivery plugin prime.post worktree re-materialization (§11)
